reviews.review_title: One of the best games on the market
reviews.review_description: I’ve had an amazing time playing this game. It’s very engaging and every match is different depending on who you’re playing with, the content creates itself! The main issue of the game is definitely what a lot of others wrote about, player base which isn’t big enough. But that’s definitely something we as players have to work on, not only the devs. Let’s play, let’s make this game what we want it to be, lest hunt together!

This game is absolutely fantastic! But it has only two problems: marketing, and low player counts. I want to see this game get the recognition it deserves! The only thing I can do though is give some suggestions that maybe, hopefully, will reach the devs.

1. Replace the AI thumbnail. 

I'm not sure if the thumbnail is AI or not, but it looks like it. People tend to avoid AI thumbnails in most cases, I much preferred the old thumbnail of the creepy mansion. Maybe a more catching thumbnail made by hand could do the game some good?

2. Reach out to people. 

I'm not saying go and beg people to play the game, but the dev team needs to find a way to get their game out there! YouTube shorts, Tiktok, Instagram, something! Go and find content creators and give them a shot at the game to get some attention. Sail Vr is a great example of this, with their dev logs and gameplay teasers. Maybe try something of a similar kind?

3. (If all else fails) Go Free to Play. 

I'm not sure how the devs feel about F2P, but it would definitely give a boost to the player count, and generally help with the "no players online" issue that the game has. It would flood the game with little kids, and maybe the community would get a but more salty, but at least there'd be people online! 

These are just some of the most simple solutions to the player problem I could come up with. I don't know if they'd work in reality, but it's worth a shot right? I can only hope that some person on the team reads this and takes into consideration of what I've said. 

That's all I have to say for now. 10/10 game though.
The game has an interesting atmosphere and simple rules, which makes it easy to pick up. Each session feels different and keeps the experience fresh.

Scarring someone. Is pure satisfaction. 
Game Works smooth and is a lot of fun interacting with other players.
Played with my brother, awesome. But the singleplayer is also very good, recommend
Unfortunately,  looks decent game though
A good game, at this price you can't go wrong.  Get it.

My friend and I find this game and it’s co cool.
Can’t stop playing
very good game why not more playing

Loved playing this with my brother. It's got a little bit of spookyness to it, though you of course have to play into it with whoever you're playing with. Both roles are really fun, and I hope at some point there can potentially be more modes or maps or whatever. Keep it up!

developer_response.body:
Hey BigMMonkee,

Thank you for leaving a review and we're thrilled you are having a blast with your brother in our game! :) Keep on hunting! Cheers!

reviews.review_description: It doesn't t start ,what can I do ?
Tried to play it but there was no one to play with which made the game unplayable. Needs a solo single player mode to make it playable, else it’s a dead game. A story mode would be even better.

developer_response.body:
Hi Pixxelpusher,

EDIT: As of January 16th 2025 we have included a Solo Waiting Mode when matchmaking - hope you can test it out :)

Thank you for your feedback! We’re sorry to hear about your experience and we're working on improving our matchmaking system. We're excited to share that we’re actively working on a solo adventure mode to enhance the game for players who enjoy playing solo. Stay tuned for updates and thank you for your input! Cheers!

reviews.review_description:
The game overall is ok, runs well and is very smooth fps. That being said the game is very lacking in actual gameplay. Only 2 game modes and only one allows you to play with more than 1 friend. As well as the maps have very limited interactions while as a ghost.

There are no instructions for what to do when the hunter is trapping you, feels like there is no way to escape the box. Every round played ended up with the hunter winning. 

With some more updates in content I feel this game has promise in being good. Maybe some more abilities for the ghost or interactions in the maps.

Me and my brother play this game all the time I love it so much and always enjoy playing it and it’s just a fun experience messing with each other there’s really no cons to this game it’s just so good

developer_response.body:
Hey jjcarstens,

Thank you for leaving a review and we're glad you are enjoying the game with your brother :) Hope our newest update enhanced your experience even more! Happy Hunting!

reviews.review_description:
I love this game it is super fun and not too graphic but with the new update it makes it extremely hard for the ghost to win in the 1v1 mode.

 Some suggestions 

You could make it so the hunters tasks are slightly harder or take more time to do them

Make tasks for the ghost to help find/jump scare the hunter. 

All in all this game is worth the time and money, super fun and has a lot of potential, I'm excited to see what the developers do next.

developer_response.body:
Hi Happycamper.51924,

Thank you for leaving a review and for sharing your suggestions! We'll take a look and see if we could incorporate some of them in the future; you can always contact us directly on Discord :)

Happy Hunting!

reviews.review_description:
The game is only a little bit spooky, but keeping in mind that it's PvP and not AI makes it much more fun than scary! And when the adrenaline kicks in, you just focus on your goals and get into rivalry mode. Finally, there is something with a fresh idea in my library. 

It's one of those games that gives you the "one more game" feeling. 

Definitely recommend it!

developer_response.body: We are glad to hear that you enjoy your hunting! Keep in mind that succumbing to the "one more game" syndrome paves the way to becoming a true Ghost/Hunter champion!

reviews.review_title: Game is fantastic and the devs listen!
reviews.review_description:
Game isn’t that scary (I mean that in a good way). It’s more just a spooky vibe. The game plays like a PvP stealth game. It almost reminds me of the old Spies vs Mercs (Splinter Cell) multiplayer game mode from a long time ago. 

I would highly recommend giving this game a chance. There’s a high learning curve on both sides (Hunter or Ghost) but once you get the hang of it and learn the maps, it’s incredibly fun. There’s not really anything like this in VR at the moment. 

The 1v1 mode is the highlight and honestly I completely ignore the 3v1 mode since it plays completely differently and I don’t find it as compelling.

developer_response.body:
Hi Bayspoon,

Thank you for leaving a review! We do our best to listen to the community, and we believe that that game gets better with each newly released update - thanks to you! :) 
It's fantastic to see that you are enjoying the game; once again, thank you for leaving a review. Keep on hunting! 

Cheers!

reviews.review_description: Is a very good game. It’s scary but not a bad scary like someone said.

developer_response.body:
Hi MagagirlVI,

Thank you for leaving a review and mentioning that our game is not as scary as it appears (it can still be a treat for horror fans though!). Happy Hunting! :)

reviews.review_description: This game is amazing but the issue is that not a lot of people play it but I have a solution. I have seen that you have a YouTube channel so what you can do is that you upload videos on there every 1-2 days. I have seen two other channels that has a way of promoting their game and that is battle glide and sail vr. So if you upload you can get more people to play your game. And if you start getting recognized you can maybe lower the game to $15 so that it is more affordable for other people. But anyways I love this game and if you can a least try it would mean a lot to me and the game because if nobody plays the game then this game will be like it never existed. But keep up the good work and I can’t wait to see the future of this game.

reviews.review_description: The 1v1 duel is a lot of fun! The 1v3 hide and seek not as much. If the 1v3 was a little more like the duel in the mansion and orphanage, it's a 5 star for sure. 👍

developer_response.body: Hi, SmokedBurrito! We are happy to hear that you enjoyed the 1v1 elimination mode. We hope that with the arrival of new locations and other cool features that we announced in the Hunt Together Content RoadMap, you will reconsider your rating and reward us with 5 stars 😄 More interesting in-game content is on the way!

reviews.review_title: It's definitely got a lot of potential!
reviews.review_description:
It's definitely got a lot of potential! The mechanics are quite good and the game has a really nice tutorial for each characters. The visuals and the level design is pretty nice, and the game can become quite scary knowing someone is hunting you as you try to hunt them. 
I would love for the game to have more content though, but maybe we should wait for more updates. 

Overall it's something new and interesting in the PvP world!

developer_response.body: Thank you, Padma Xo, for your awesome review 😍 We wish you many more spooky adventures and thrilling, victorious moments!

reviews.review_title: Finally i could with my parner together
reviews.review_description: After the long tutorial (I can understand why but it's too long 1st time, we couldn't skip it) , i was no able to create and invite a 1v1 game with my partner (both have it bought), when we try it but, once we enter the invitation code, we are expelled/moved to the main menu of the game, so it was impossible to play each other (the main raison for this game for us, to be honest). Waiting your help, thnks!! :)

developer_response.body:
Hi JorgeSantamaria,

Thanks for sharing your experience, and we're sorry to hear about the trouble you faced setting up a game with your partner. We're looking into ways to shorten the tutorial.

Regarding the issue you encountered with the 1v1 game, we'd love to help sort that out for you. Can you reach out to us on Discord? Link: https://discord.gg/becomeawizard
Our Community Manager is actively monitoring it, and we'll work together to get you and your partner back into the game! Appreciate your patience and understanding!

Cheers!

reviews.review_title: It's hard to find someone to play with
reviews.review_description: All this game needs at this very moment is a bit more marketing because it feels like only 20 people play this game

developer_response.body:
Hey Bobombsaway,

Thanks a bunch for checking out our game! We're working on ramping up our marketing efforts to get more people aware of our game. Hopefully, you will have more Ghosts and Hunters to play with soon! :)

If you have any ideas or suggestions on how we can make the game even more appealing, feel free to join our Discord and share your thoughts!

Happy hunting!

reviews.review_description:
To start off, this game is amazing and very polished with no bugs that I have noticed so far.
I would recommend to horror game enjoyers and people who aren’t as much of a fan of horror as well, due to the well made designs and features allowing you to avoid scary situations if you use traps correctly.

One suggestion I have is making the elimination mode available for 1v2, as I enjoy this game mode a lot but find it slightly disappointing that I can’t face off against two hunters or team up with a friend to avoid and take down the ghost.

Another suggestion that I think would be nice, but am not sure how it would be balanced is the addition of ghost and hunter classes, so that depending which type of hunter/ghost you are, you have slight advantages and disadvantages against certain ghosts or hunter classes.

Thank you for taking the time to read my review and I would definitely recommend this game to anyone.

developer_response.body:
Hi Manymanlymen!

Thank you so much for your fantastic review and thoughtful suggestions! We're thrilled you're enjoying the game and appreciate the polished experience we've worked hard to deliver :)

Your feedback regarding the elimination mode for 1v2 is duly noted! The idea of introducing ghost and hunter classes is intriguing. While balancing is key, we'll discuss internally how to incorporate this without compromising the overall game dynamics.

We're grateful for your support and recommendation! If you have any more ideas or thoughts, feel free to share them with us. Happy gaming!

reviews.review_description: Was low-key waiting for this game and it blew my mind! It's a bit scary and I love it, its so much fun while being a bit competitive and it's very intuitive. Definitely big recommendation from me (come play with me! :D)

developer_response.body:
Hi redowski!

Thank you for your awesome feedback! We're thrilled to hear Hunt Together exceeded your expectations! Your recommendation means a lot, hope to see you in the game! Happy hunting!

reviews.review_title: How does this game have high reviews?
reviews.review_description:
I bought this game day 1…tutorial is fun and the game seems to be fun in general.

That is…if anyone is ever playing.

I’ve tried several times now within a span of a few days to play a game online…I either get no servers responding, or paired with a person who always is the ghost, and never communicates regardless. 

I’m getting a refund before I can’t anymore as I think I’ve tried different times of the day and other things to see about playing this game with more people…and nothing.

Not to mention there’s only three maps, and after playing them a few times it gets repetitive and boring. 

Again…cool concept and probably going to be better after updates…but no one plays.

developer_response.body:
Hey DeathWatch806,

Thank you for sharing your thoughts on the game. We're sorry to hear you've had a bit of a tough time finding matches. That's not the kind of experience we want for our players. Making the matchmaking smoother is top of our to-do list - you can check our recently published Road Map to see our plans for the game. 

If you ever change your mind or have more feedback to drop, we're here :) Thank you for leaving a review, and we hope to win you back in the future! Cheers!

reviews.review_description: fun game had a super fun time playing it  and my favorite horror game but this game needs voice chat

developer_response.body: Hey, Fortiscool! Thank you for 5 stars and your kind words 🤩 As for voice chat, it will be introduced in March 2024

reviews.review_description: Very good game I would recommend it to a lot of people if they were looking for a horror game with multiplayer, but there isn’t a lot of people playing it very much. I know its fairly new and lots of people will download it in the future, also I have a couple of ideas for the game like make different skins for characters have their own buffs and debuffs, add item loadouts to to game modes except for hide and seek, and add new items like crosses and ghost items and make different ghost types.

developer_response.body:
Hi Lennox.871475,

Thank you for leaving a review and for sharing your suggestions. We're working on our next update, so there's definitely more content coming to the game very soon (and we'll consider some of your thoughts as well!). We hope you will continue to have a good time in Hunt Together :) Happy Hunting!

reviews.review_description:
I tried this for the first time after doing the tutorial and literally couldn't find a single player? Bunk install maybe. Uninstalled and reinstalled and will update once I try again. There is decent graphics and mechanics and I really love the concept for this. There is so much potential here. The thrill of the hunt vs being hunted. There's a nice array of gadgets/abilities for each class as well as a few different skins. Really cool idea just didn't get to play at all with anyone. I made a lobby and sat there for a good ten minutes. Will update once I try again like I said.

Update: I tried again this morning and sadly I still cannot find a match. It would not even let me into matchmaking. It kept booting me back to the main menu of the game and would not even start a lobby or room nor find one. Sadly, I have to refund this one. I was really looking forward to it. Guess that just means I don't need it. I'm sure it is a great game though if you can manage to find a lobby or get hooked up with some players

developer_response.body:
Hi VirtualJuggalo7,

Thank you for giving our game a shot and sharing your experience. We're sorry you had trouble finding other players. We're actively optimizing the matchmaking to ensure a more seamless experience for everyone.

If the issue persists, please message us on our Discord: https://discord.gg/becomeawizard

We're here to help get you into the thrilling ghost-hunting action and ensure you have a blast with others :)

Thank you again for your understanding.

Cheers!

reviews.review_description:
I own two quests and playing this game with my Brother is EXTREMELY FUN! This kind of game is perfect for VR! Not a scary game in general, but being chased by my brother or me chasing him as the ghost is really satisfying!

Requests:

1- One minor change that'd be cool would be the "jump scare" actually being a "Five Nights At Freddy's" level scare. (Or make it optional for those that want to get the scare when they lose)

2- I'm sure it's intentional, but the Talisman shots are really hard to aim where u want... but from the games we played, the game seems fairly balanced for both players.

3- Option to remove the Timer for a "draw" in private lobbies.

4- In private lobbies it seems the host always starts as the ghost. Maybe something yall could do to randomize it?

I hope there's a few updates planned for more maps or something in the future. But for the $20 price tag, the replayability is infinite!

developer_response.body:
Hi Dividend_Paco,

Thank you for leaving a review! We're glad you are enjoying the game with your brother! And thank you for your requests, we'll take a look at those; feel free to join our Discord if you want to chat with us in more detail :)

Happy Hunting!

reviews.review_title: One of the best PvP game in Store
reviews.review_description: awesome game, I bought it the first day it was released, PvP is fun, role switching (hunter/ghost), missions to get equipment (great idea) large maps for 2 players. The game is already good, I believe that it will be even better after the updates

reviews.review_description: Although sadly people don’t play as much

developer_response.body:
Hey Getgoodlol1212,

Thanks for leaving a review! We're constantly improving our matchmaking; if this helps our community hangs on our Discord to schedule matches: https://discord.gg/becomeawizard 

Happy hunting!

reviews.review_description:
Given this is solely a PVP game, you need other players to play. Unfortunately in my experience, they are difficult to find. I’ve found myself standing around for 10 minutes only to quit and do something else.

I’ve played two games, one was quite fun, the other the player quit, the rest of the time I’ve been searching for players. 

It has potential, but without a player base, it’s a waste of money and time.

developer_response.body:
Hey Sam.nicole.2022,

Thanks for leaving a review! We understand your experience with finding other players might have been disappointing, but we're constantly improving our matchmaking, and a new update is coming! We hope you will give our game another go as soon as the patch drops :)

If you have any thoughts or suggestions, please let us know by visiting our Discord channel!

Thank you!
